discussion.content: Three core services (checkout, payment, order) are experiencing elevated error rates, with checkout-service peaking at 19.59% errors, payment-api at 13.18%, and order-service at 8.77%. All services show high request volumes, indicating a broad impact on production traffic.

Correlate these spikes with recent deployments (query index=deploy_events) and check infra metrics for the hosts running these services. Prioritize reviewing the latest checkout-service deployment and any shared dependencies that could cause cascading failures.

timeline: [Triage] Three core services (checkout, payment, order) are experiencing elevated error rates, with checkout-service peaking at 19.59% errors, payment-api at 13.18%, and order-service at 8.77%. All services show high request volumes, indicating a broad impact on production traffic. — severity: SEV-2
